description: Add a usable SAM.gov API key for acquisition scans, either as SAM_GOV_API_KEY in the service/runtime environment or as a verified sam_gov source credential in Bitwarden/local encrypted storage. Current dev Bitwarden org Gnome Automation has bidnetdirect.com and SDCOC APEX eCenterDirect, but no SAM.gov API key item.

comments.text: Environment check: Bitwarden CLI is unlocked for pc when BITWARDENCLI_APPDATA_DIR=/opt/gnome-garden-shared/.config/bitwarden-cli is set, and user pc now has ACL write access to that config dir. The current sam_gov source credential is invalid because item name SAM.gov is not present in the Gnome Automation org vault. Org currently lists bidnetdirect.com and SDCOC APEX eCenterDirect only. Add a SAM.gov API key item or update the credential to the correct item ID/name, then mark/test it verified.

Tried the operator-provided SAM.gov value from chat on 2026-07-11. SAM.gov API returned 401/rejected during SourceCredentialTesting.test_credential/2. Deleted the newly-created invalid local encrypted credential so the rejected value is not retained. Remaining sam_gov credential is the Bitwarden reference to item name SAM.gov, still invalid because that item is not present in the Gnome Automation vault.

Corrected SAM.gov API key verified successfully on 2026-07-11. Stored as local encrypted sam_gov family credential id 313709e8-57cf-4e42-b0cf-94cb93d2b996; disabled stale Bitwarden reference credential 43c3c531-0b86-41fc-8e7b-9c8c44e14020 so resolver uses the verified local credential.

title: Add verified SAM.gov API credential
